## 变更类型 / Change Type

- [ ] 新增条目 / Add a new entry
- [ ] 修改条目描述 / Update an entry description
- [ ] 修复失效链接或错误信息 / Fix a broken link or incorrect information
- [ ] 调整分类或文档说明 / Adjust categories or documentation

## 变更内容 / What Changed

请简要说明这次 PR 做了什么。
Briefly describe what this PR changes.

## 收录理由 / Why It Belongs Here

如果你新增了项目，请说明：
If you are adding a project, please explain:

- 该项目蒸馏的对象、关系或方法论是什么？
- 它为什么适合本存储库？
- 它为什么应该放在当前分类下？
- What person, relationship, or methodology does the project distill?
- Why is it a good fit for this repository?
- Why does it belong in the chosen category?

## 自查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 我已阅读 `CONTRIBUTING.md`。 / I have read `CONTRIBUTING.en.md`.
- [ ] 我确认提交内容与“人格蒸馏”主题相关。 / I confirm the submission is relevant to the persona distillation theme.
- [ ] 我确认链接可公开访问，名称与描述基本准确。 / I confirm the links are publicly accessible and the names and descriptions are basically accurate.
- [ ] 我尽量避免了重复条目或宣传性表述。 / I have tried to avoid duplicate entries and promotional wording.
- [ ] 我已运行 `npm run format`，并确认格式、链接和文案表述与存储库现有风格一致。 / I have run `npm run format` and confirmed the formatting, links, and wording match the repository's existing style.

## 备注 / Notes

如有补充背景、相似项目对比或需要审阅者特别关注的地方，请写在这里。
Add any extra context, comparisons with similar projects, or points that need special review.
